title: [MTR3/NTE][MTR4] Czech Tram-Trolley Catenary
description: Czech Elektroline Catenary for Modern Cities by Mrcreativschik. Base models made by Oleg Factor (VTL/former member of OZMT), MAN NL 202(592)
body:
This pack adds elements of the Czech trolleybus overhead contact system from **Elektoline**. These include the pendulum suspensions that weren't included in the [TrolleyWire pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trolleywire-pack) pack. High-speed switches are also manufactured by the St. Petersburg company IVIS LLC; such switches are installed at least in St. Petersburg and Krasnodar.

Compatible with MTR3-NTE and MTR4

Этот пак добавляет элементы Чешской троллейбусной контактной сети от компании **Elektoline**. Те самые [маятниковые подвески](https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9A%D0%BE%D0%BD%D1%82%D0%B0%D0%BA%D1%82%D0%BD%D0%B0%D1%8F_%D1%81%D0%B5%D1%82%D1%8C_%D1%82%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%BB%D0%BB%D0%B5%D0%B9%D0%B1%D1%83%D1%81%D0%B0#), которые не были включены в [пак TrolleyWire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trolleywire-pack). Скоростные стрелки также производит Петербужская компания ООО "ИВИС", такие стрелки установлены по крайней мере в Санкт-Петербурге и Краснодаре

Совместим с MTR3-NTE и MTR4
